name: Bill Clinton
subject: Do you know where you'll vote on March 1st?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by hundreds of thousands of grassroots donors
body:
Ready for the big day? | Friend --

I've been hitting the trail with Hillary these past few weeks, and one thing is crystal clear -- folks are excited to get out and vote for her on March 1st.

That excitement has got to translate into action -- it's going to be a close election, so you need to do your part and come out to vote. Before you head to the polls, make sure you have all the information you need. Wake up tomorrow ready to cast your ballot for Hillary in your primary!

**Look up your polling place right now:**
[ | | [**Confirm my address**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjQ4NTAxNDIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzYwMDgyMTYwS0&mt=1&rt=0)
--- ](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjQ4NTAxNDIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzYwMDgyMTYwS0&mt=1&rt=0)
Hillary faces a tough fight tomorrow. Every member of Team Hillary needs to come out, vote, and bring a friend or two with you.

Let's bring this home for Hillary.

Thanks,

Bill

| Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by hundreds of thousands of grassroots donors.

subject: We're gonna need a bigger goal again
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bernie 2016
body:
This is unbelievable. In just 12 hours, you crushed our goal of raising $40 million in the month of February.
But I don't think we can stop now. Not so close to Super Tuesday. **So in the spirit of this campaign, we're going to reach for a way bigger, way more difficult goal - raising $45 million this month.**
I'll be honest: The math is extremely difficult here. **Can we raise another $5 million today? Probably not. But I think it's very important that we try beforetonight's midnight fundraising deadline.**

subject: I'm shocked

body:

Not only did we meet our goal of $40 million raised in the month of February -- without asking a single millionaire or billionaire for money -- but we have a chance to reach an updated goal of $45 million.
Will we get there? It will be really difficult, and I am not sure it's possible. But if anyone can put us over the top, it's you.

subject: #ChooseCruz

body:
Dear Friend,

Today is the day --
Super Tuesday. You, along with thousands of volunteers across
America, have been making phone calls, knocking on doors, talking
to friends, and so much more -- and it's all been for this very
moment.

Now we need your help
with the most important part -- bringing your friends, family,
and neighbors with you to vote and/or caucus for Ted Cruz:
https://www.tedcruz.org/super-tuesday/

You can get a head
start by committing to #ChooseCruz here. And after you have done
that, spread the word on Facebook and Twitter. Then please pick
up the phone to call, text, or email everyone you know and
encourage them to #ChooseCruz today as well!

Thank you for
everything you've done so far -- now let's go out there and win
it. Every person you bring with you to the polls brings us that
much closer to victory.

Let's do this
together,

Mark Campbell
National Political
Director
Cruz for President

| | | | Peter, Today, polls will open across your state and you will have your chance to make sure that Super Tuesday is a great day for Marco! **Unfortunately, the last few weeks have been marred by reports of dirty tricks by other campaigns, and so we need you to be our eyes and ears on the ground.** When you go to cast your vote, if you encounter any problems or delays in casting your vote (such as voting machine errors or difficulties, your precinct running low on ballots, or excessively long delays in the check-in process) or if you experience or notice any confusion regarding the legal voting process in your state, first inform the polling place officials, and then let us know by contacting our Super Tuesday legal team at **[Legal@MarcoRubio.com](mailto:Legal@MarcoRubio.com)** or (470) 223-1617. Today's vote is your state's first step toward a New American Century, and we want to ensure that all voices are represented fairly and honestly. We appreciate your help in making sure that the electoral process runs smoothly. Thank you for for all of your hard work, dedication, and support. Let's win this for Marco! Team Marco

name: Alice Stewart
subject: #CruzCrew Daily Briefing
disclaimer_text:
PAID FOR
BY CRUZ FOR PRESIDENT
body:
Dear Friend,

Today is the most
critical day in the Republican primary. For the first time in
decades, voters in eleven states have the chance to help nominate
a proven conservative. A conservative who has never backed down
from fighting for the American people - whether it's for our
Second Amendment right to bear arms, our religious liberty, or
for bringing back jobs, growth, and unlimited opportunity.

Texas is the crown
jewel of Super Tuesday. And here in Ted Cruz's home state, the
people of Texas overwhelmingly support Ted Cruz because he has
kept their trust and stood firm on his principles against the
Washington powerbrokers.

We cannot nominate a
candidate who is a self-described dealmaker. Ted Cruz is the only
candidate who has beaten and can beat Donald Trump.

If conservatives and
Republicans across the country unite, we will break the
Washington Cartel and once again put the people first.

Best,

Alice Stewart
Communications
Director

name: Rand Paul
subject: They think they're better than you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for Senate
body:
Patriot,

Washington, D.C. thinks you don't know how to
spend the money you earn.

After all, you certainly would spend $6
million of your own money to promote tourism in Albania, right?

You probably wouldn't spend $100,000 on a
flower show for the National Park Service, or $15 million to do
golf club research in space or $450,000 to produce climate change
video games either.

To the politicians, this is all proof that
you just can't be trusted!

But I think it proves quite the opposite. I
think it's proof we need to kick our federal government out of
our lives.

If you agree, can I count on you to take
action insisting the Budget Committee includes my proposed cuts
in the 2017 Budget?

And if possible, agree to your most generous
contribution of $50, $25 or even $10 right away?

Patriot, every year, my U.S. Senate office
puts out a report showing how our federal government wastes our
tax dollars.

Sadly, the examples I just gave you are just
the beginning.

The big spenders also shelled out:

>>> $43 million for a gas station in
Afghanistan

>>> $50,000 for Christmas tree television
ads

>>> $15.6 million to cover foreign students'
college tuition

>>> $175 million for a fraud-riddled sleep
apnea study

>>> $25,000 for a U.S. Forest Service
laundromat

>>> $380,000 for a study to investigate my
first-year college students pack on the pounds -- often called
"the Freshman 15″

>>> $218,000 for a campaign to sterilize
feral coyotes and invasive burros

>>> $15,000 grant for a conference on balding

Sadly, all of this doesn't even begin to
touch on our federal government's waste.

With $19 TRILLION in debt, the big spending
politicians and power-hungry bureaucrats in Washington, D.C. are
sending our country rambling toward an economic cliff.

The good news is, we can stop it . . .

But politicians must understand that time is
up for politics as usual.

That's why your action is so critical.

Will you please take action insisting the
Budget Committee includes my proposed cuts in the 2017 Budget?

And please, if at all possible, agree to your
most generous contribution of $50, $25 or $10 to help me force my
colleagues to cut the waste!

In Liberty,
Rand Paul

Pitch in $25 TODAY >>

Pitch in $50 TODAY >>

Pitch in $75 TODAY >>

Pitch in $100 TODAY>>

Or donate another
amount >>

Paid for by Rand Paul for Senate

\- You can find your polling location here: [https://vote.elections.virginia.gov/VoterInformation#](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fvote.elections.virginia.gov%2FVoterInformation%23&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=election_day&n=1)
\- Anyone can vote in the Republican Primary. There are no forms to sign. If you are a registered voter in Virginia, simply show up and request a Republican form.
\- You can vote in the primary even if you never have voted in a Primary before. All Virginia voters – even those who usually only vote in November - can vote today!
\- Bring your ID. In Virginia, all voters must have a valid, government-issued photo ID to vote.
\- You MUST be in line before 7PM to vote. Once in line do not leave. You can vote as long as you stay in line.
\- You MUST ask for a Republican ballot. If you do not receive a Republican ballot, give it back. Do not mark the Democrat ballot. Politely and firmly ask for the correct ballot.
\- If you encounter any irregularities, please call the campaign immediately 804-277-9315. Leave your name, phone number, the precinct location, the time you saw the irregularity, and as many details as possible.
## **Today, we Make America Great Again one vote at a time!**

Paid for by Donald J. Trump for President, Inc.

Will you make your voice heard? | Friend --

I've seen my fair share of election days, but the excitement of knowing that people are headed to the polls never wears off -- especially on a day as important as Super Tuesday!

Participating in our democracy is how we all make our voices heard and move this country forward. At the end of the day, that’s what campaigns are all about -- I'm so grateful to have you on my team for this amazing journey.

name: Marco Rubio
subject: this is just the beginning
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for President
body:
| | | | | | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/46433722:6n5Ub_rFN:m:1:1349778030:3401B644487067CC2AA363F051338916:r)
---
| | | | Peter, In the days leading up to tonight, a lot of the media had written us off. And despite the fact that we've shown we can win delegates all across the country, there's no doubt they're still going to treat me like an underdog. You know what? That's fine: **I 'm happy to be an underdog. We're a country of underdogs.** I come from a community of underdogs, too, as I said in Miami tonight. I've been an underdog in the past -- **and once again, we 're going to be an underdog campaign that WINS.** It's great to be back home \-- we're excited to earn a victory in Florida in a couple weeks, and continue unmasking Donald Trump for the con artist he is all across the country. **[But we need your help more than ever to stop Donald Trump: Go here right now to join our movement, unite the party, and take back the White House next fall.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/46433722:6n5Ub_rFN:m:1:1349778030:3401B644487067CC2AA363F051338916:r)** This is going to be a long, tough fight, but I'm not going to stop until we win. The stakes of this election are even higher than they were when we started -- it's not just about taking back the White House for Republicans, it's also about making sure we have a nominee who believes in the ideals of the party of Reagan and Lincoln. [**No matter how many states it takes, no matter how many weeks and months it takes, we are going to stop Donald Trump, and win this election.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/46433722:6n5Ub_rFN:m:1:1349778030:3401B644487067CC2AA363F051338916:r) But I won't be able to do it without your support, and I hope I can [**count on you tonight.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/46433722:6n5Ub_rFN:m:1:1349778030:3401B644487067CC2AA363F051338916:r) Thank you so much, Marco Rubio
P.S. My team set a goal earlier tonight of raising $400,000 by the time the next four states -- Kansas, Kentucky, Louisiana, and Maine -- vote on Saturday. We're already rushing toward that goal. In fact, I wouldn't be surprised if we beat it within just 24 hours. [**Will you join us right now?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/46433722:6n5Ub_rFN:m:1:1349778030:3401B644487067CC2AA363F051338916:r)
---
| | [**STOP DONALD TRUMP >>** ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/46433722:6n5Ub_rFN:m:1:1349778030:3401B644487067CC2AA363F051338916:r)
